rationale: From absolute zero. First 14 days are warm-up (limited cadence to avoid new-page spam flags), so growth is back-loaded to weeks 3-4. Targets weight LEADING indicators I directly control (reels shipped, ad video-views, posts) over the lagging outcome (followers). Benchmarks: research puts ~1,000 followers at weeks-to-3-months for a consistent-Reels page; month 1 from zero with $7/day realistically lands 150-250. Reels are the reach engine, so 8 (2/wk) is the non-negotiable. Recalibrated weekly against actuals.

targets.label: Reels shipped
targets.note: 2/wk — the reach engine. Fully in my control.

targets.label: Ad video views
targets.note: $7/day builds the retarget pool. ~$0.035 blended CPV incl. learning.

targets.label: Total engagement
targets.note: Comments are weighted — discussion drives reach.

targets.label: Followers
targets.note: The lagging outcome. Back-loaded to weeks 3-4.

targets.label: Page likes
targets.note: Tracks followers; from the retarget→follow campaign.
